zh.lifeSummary: 當Denes or Diones於1460年出生在英國素瑞桑德斯亞德時，她的父親William Dennys39歲，母親Joan St Aubyn50歲。她於1485年與Thomas Wood在英國英格蘭素瑞桑德斯亞德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年3月17日在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國艾可巴爾金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Denes or Diones于1460年出生在英国素瑞桑德斯亞德时，她的父亲William Dennys39岁，母亲Joan St Aubyn50岁。她于1485年与Thomas Wood在英国英格兰素瑞桑德斯亞德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年3月17日在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国艾可巴爾金。

nameMeanings.name: Denes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Bela, Laszlo, Miklos, Tibor, Aranka, Balint, Endre, Ferenc, Lajos, Zoltan.  Jewish Imrich, Meyer.  Romanian Doina, Matei, Radu.
Hungarian (Dénes): from the personal name Dénes, from Greek Dionysios (see Dennis ). The surname Dénes is also found in Slovakia; compare 2 below.
Slovak (Deneš and Déneš) and Romanian (also Deneş): from the Hungarian personal name Dénes ‘Dennis’, or an adaptation of the Hungarian surname Dénes (see 1 above).

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

variants.name: Dienes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Sandor, Zol, Zoltan.
German: from a vernacular form of the personal name Dionysius (see Dennis ).

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Diones
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Denes or Diones was born in 1460, in Sanderstead, Surrey, England, her father, William Dennys, was 39 and her mother, Joan St Aubyn, was 50. She married Thomas Wood in 1485, in Sanderstead, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 17 March 1530, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Barking, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Denes or Diones est née en 1460, à Sanderstead, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William Dennys, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan St Aubyn, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wood en 1485, à Sanderstead, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 mars 1530, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Barking, Essex, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1485 in Sanderstead, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Thomas Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 17. März 1530 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Barking, Essex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Denes or Dionesが1460年にイギリススリーサンダーステアドで生まれた時，父William Dennysは39歳，母Joan St Aubynは50歳であった。1485年にイギリスイギリススリーサンダーステアドでThomas Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年3月17日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスバーキングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Denes or Diones(이)가 1460년 영국 수리 샌더스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Dennys(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan St Aubyn(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 샌더스테아드에서 Thomas Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 3월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 바킨그에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Wood em 1485, em Sanderstead, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Denes or Diones родилась в 1460 г. в местности сэндирстид, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени William Dennys было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan St Aubyn, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wood в 1485 г. в местности сэндирстид, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 марта 1530 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности баркинг, эссекс, Англия.
